# [Page Statements](#page-statements)

Statements for creating, modifying, and dropping pages, snippets, and layouts.

Pages define the user interface of a Mendix application. Each page has a layout, a title, optional parameters, and a widget tree that describes the UI structure. Snippets are reusable widget fragments that can be embedded in pages.

| Statement | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [CREATE PAGE](#create-page-1) | Create a page with a widget tree |
| [CREATE SNIPPET](#create-snippet-1) | Create a reusable widget fragment |
| [ALTER PAGE / ALTER SNIPPET](#alter-page--alter-snippet-1) | Modify an existing page or snippet in-place |
| [DROP PAGE / SNIPPET](#drop-page--snippet) | Remove a page or snippet |
| [CREATE LAYOUT](#create-layout) | Create a page layout |
